nodes.text:
Patient reports abdominal discomfort and abdominal discomfort over 7 weeks, with increasing severity. Patient also reports night sweats.
Flexi sig lesion in the upper rectum, unable to reach TI

MRI 22/2/24 -T3c, N1c, EMVI negative, CRM clear
CT 23/2/24 - suspicious liver lesion
